scripts.clean: echo "nothing to clean (JSON data package)" && exit 0
scripts.dev: echo "no dev server (JSON data package)" && exit 0
scripts.emit: node ../../.claude/skills/figma-to-design-tokens/figma-snapshot-build.mjs --tmp && node ../../.claude/skills/figma-to-design-tokens/emit-primitives.mjs && node ../../.claude/skills/figma-to-design-tokens/emit-semantics.mjs && node ../../.claude/skills/figma-to-design-tokens/emit-components.mjs && pnpm run validate
scripts.lint: echo "no lint (JSON data package; validated via test)" && exit 0
scripts.lint:fix: echo "no lint (JSON data package; validated via test)" && exit 0
scripts.validate: ajv compile -s schemas/tier.schema.json --spec=draft2020 --strict=false && ajv validate -s schemas/tier.schema.json -d "tiers/primitives.json" -d "tiers/semantics.json" -d "tiers/components.json" --spec=draft2020 --strict=false
